title: Asynchronous Mail Service with Retry and Delay
statement: Design and implement a high-availability asynchronous mail service using a queue. Implement a retry mechanism with exponential backoff for failed mail sends and add a delay feature to allow users to schedule mail sends at a later time. The service should be able to handle multiple concurrent mail sends from various users. The queue should persist data across server restarts, and the mail sends should be thread-safe.
constraints: Must use BullMQ as the queue provider for this task
Must handle concurrent mail sends from multiple users
Must persist queue data across server restarts

endpoints.description: Send a mail asynchronously with retry and delay options
Get the status of the mail queue
